children.html: f(t)=∥a−tb∥2f(t) = \| \boldsymbol{a} - t \boldsymbol{b} \|^2f(t)=∥a−tb∥2

children.value:
\begin{aligned}
f(t)
&= \langle \boldsymbol{a} - t \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{a} - t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle
\quad (\because 
\|\boldsymbol{a}\|^2=
\langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a}\rangle
)
\\
&= \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a} - t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle
- \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{a} - t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle \\
&= \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a} \rangle
- \langle \boldsymbol{a}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle
- \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{a}\rangle
+ \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle
\quad (\because 線形性により)
\\
&= \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a} \rangle
- 2 \langle \boldsymbol{a}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle
+ \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle
\quad (\because 対称性により
\langle \boldsymbol{a}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle
= \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{a}\rangle
) \\
&= \| \boldsymbol{a} \|^2
- 2 \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{b} \rangle t
+ t^2 \| \boldsymbol{b} \|^2
\\
\end{aligned}
children.html: f(t)=⟨a−tb,a−tb⟩(∵∥a∥2=⟨a,a⟩)=⟨a,a−tb⟩−⟨tb,a−tb⟩=⟨a,a⟩−⟨a,tb⟩−⟨tb,a⟩+⟨tb,tb⟩(∵線形性により)=⟨a,a⟩−2⟨a,tb⟩+⟨tb,tb⟩(∵対称性により⟨a,tb⟩=⟨tb,a⟩)=∥a∥2−2⟨a,b⟩t+t2∥b∥2\begin{aligned} f(t) &= \langle \boldsymbol{a} - t \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{a} - t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle \quad (\because \|\boldsymbol{a}\|^2= \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a}\rangle ) \\ &= \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a} - t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle - \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{a} - t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle \\ &= \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a} \rangle - \langle \boldsymbol{a}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle - \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{a}\rangle + \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle \quad (\because 線形性により) \\ &= \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a} \rangle - 2 \langle \boldsymbol{a}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle + \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle \quad (\because 対称性により \langle \boldsymbol{a}, t \boldsymbol{b} \rangle = \langle t \boldsymbol{b}, \boldsymbol{a}\rangle ) \\ &= \| \boldsymbol{a} \|^2 - 2 \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{b} \rangle t + t^2 \| \boldsymbol{b} \|^2 \\ \end{aligned}f(t)​=⟨a−tb,a−tb⟩(∵∥a∥2=⟨a,a⟩)=⟨a,a−tb⟩−⟨tb,a−tb⟩=⟨a,a⟩−⟨a,tb⟩−⟨tb,a⟩+⟨tb,tb⟩(∵線形性により)=⟨a,a⟩−2⟨a,tb⟩+⟨tb,tb⟩(∵対称性により⟨a,tb⟩=⟨tb,a⟩)=∥a∥2−2⟨a,b⟩t+t2∥b∥2​
b≠0\boldsymbol{b} \neq 0b=0

f(t)=∥b∥2t2−2⟨a,b⟩t+∥a∥2f(t) = \| \boldsymbol{b} \|^2 t^2 - 2 \langle \boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{b} \rangle t + \| \boldsymbol{a} \|^2f(t)=∥b∥2t2−2⟨a,b⟩t+∥a∥2

children.html: A,BA,BA,B
∣E[AB]∣2≤E[A2]E[B2]\big| E[A B] \big|^2 \leq E[A^2] E[B^2]∣∣​E[AB]∣∣​2≤E[A2]E[B2]
A=(X−E[X]),B=(Y−E[Y])A = (X - E[X]),\quad B = (Y - E[Y])A=(X−E[X]),B=(Y−E[Y])

children.value:
\begin{aligned}
\big| E\big[ (X - E[X]) (Y - E[Y]) \big] \big|^2
\leq E[(X - E[X])^2] E[(Y - E[Y])^2]\\
\iff
| \operatorname{Cov}(X, Y) |^2
\leq \operatorname{Var}(X) \operatorname{Var}(Y)
\\
\iff
-1 \leq
\frac{ \operatorname{Cov}(X, Y) }{ \sqrt{ \operatorname{Var}(X) } \sqrt{ \operatorname{Var}(Y) } }
\leq 1
\end{aligned}
